slices.title: Bootstrap pipeline package
slices.description: Create the package metadata, config loader, and runtime directories.
acceptance_criteria: package.json exists with the required dependencies
Runtime directories are created on startup
slices.agent_instructions: Keep the implementation CommonJS-only and synchronous where possible.

slices.title: Implement registry and CLI
slices.description: Add the SQLite registry, event log, and operator commands.
acceptance_criteria: CLI status and list output match the controller JSON contract
slices.agent_instructions: Use append-only event logging and derived display states.
